title: Minimum Cost Walk In Weighted Graph
description: For each query in an undirected weighted graph, return the minimum bitwise-AND cost of a walk, or -1 if no walk exists. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: n: int, edges: list[list[int]], query: list[list[int]]. 2 <= n <= 100000; edges and queries each <= 100000; 0-indexed undirected multigraph; weights may be zero.
output_contract: Return integer[] using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
